eval_configs.prompt: User runs /briefing with standard BRIEFING.md. Skill should plan tasks, spawn research subagents, deduplicate results, and archive to BRIEFING_SECTIONS.md.

assertions.text: BRIEFING_SECTIONS.md is created/updated with new timestamped entry
BRIEFING_LINKS.md is updated with new URLs appended
Duplicate URLs from existing BRIEFING_LINKS.md are not re-included
Output follows clean markdown format with per-analysis sections and bullet entries linking to sources
Summary report shows items found, deduplicated, included per analysis
All three analyses from BRIEFING.md are represented in output

eval_configs.prompt: User has BRIEFING.md but no tracking files. Skill should create BRIEFING_LINKS.md and BRIEFING_SECTIONS.md from scratch.

assertions.text: BRIEFING_LINKS.md is created and populated with discovered URLs
BRIEFING_SECTIONS.md is created with first timestamped entry
Skill handles missing files gracefully without errors

eval_configs.prompt: User provides custom BRIEFING.md path via argument. Skill should use that path and write results adjacent to it, not to ~/.claude/

assertions.text: BRIEFING_SECTIONS.md is written to custom directory, not ~/.claude/
BRIEFING_LINKS.md is written to custom directory, not ~/.claude/
Summary confirms custom path was used
